name: Ishmael - Needy Librarian
description:

No one expected it, but there is another bot from the prostitute POV series (I just couldn't come up with a unique scenario :/ ). So, what do we have here? Anyway, pack your things and satisfy that femboy librarian.

Yes, his name is a reference. I really like how his mouth looks, a cute little beak.
